title: LetMeBlock
changes: Fixed jetsam memory limit bypass not working presumably since iOS 9, causing the tweak to have never been working when hosts file is very large
Fixed mDNSResponderHelper not being spawn on modern iOS versions so that the memory limit can be lifted for mDNSResponder
(Rootless) Added libSandy profile to allow access to /var/jb/etc/hosts
Increased Jetsam memory limit to 512 MB

title: Pencil Pro
description:
A little better Apple Pencil functionalities, even though most of the aimed features are somewhat broken.

For more details, visit tweak's README.

title: Pearl Tracking
description:
1. Go to Settings > Control Center > Customize Controls > Enable Pearl Tracking
  2. Enable Assistive Touch
  3. Invoke Control Center
  4. Get some painkiller
  5. Turn on Pearl Tracking
  6. ???

title: HD Avatar
description: Default size of Animoji/Memoji stickers is no more than 500px * 500px and the stickers look too pixellated. This tweak will simply double the size.

title: IGClassicLayout
description: Restores the original-ish buttons layout in Instagram.
changes: Removed Shopping tab for recent Instagram versions

title: IGetMoreChoices
description: Allows for more than 4 choices for Quiz sticker in Instagram.

title: LPM Enabler
description: Natively enables Low Power Mode on your iPod and iPad. You can add Lower Power Mode module to Control Center and you can toggle it from inside Battery settings. You absolutely don't need this tweak for your iPhone or any devices running iOS 15 and above.

title: Battery Health Enabler
description: Natively enables Battery Health feature on your iPod and iPad, though the only use case is to see the current maximum capacity of your battery. Nothing else works on non-iPhone technically.

title: CAHighFPS
description: Makes CoreAnimation apps use the highest available FPS (same as your device's refresh rate). Head to Settings > CAHighFPS and enable the tweak for each of your apps. Read here for how the tweak works under-the-hood. Tested on these apps:
extra_content:
1. Asphalt 8/9 (1.1.0+)
  2. Safari Browser (1.0.3+)
  3. Where's My Water 2
  4. Plants vs Zombies (HD)
  5. Plants vs Zombies 2
  6. Bejeweled Blitz
  7. Bejeweled Classic (HD)
  8. Bloons TD 5
  9. Tiny Wings
  10. Real Racing 3
  11. Jelly Defense
changes: Added support for an array of Metal-based apps
Separate system and user apps in sections

title: Injection Foundation
description: Injects UIKit tweaks into Foundation apps. Check out the source code for how it works and the motivation behinds on GitHub.

title: ReplayKit Max
description:
Removes screen recording resolution cap (1600x1600 or 1920x1920) from ReplayKit-based applications, including SpringBoard.

Tweak version of defaults write replayd RPFullResCapture -bool 1

title: Advanced Map Enabler
description: Enables Advanced Map (3D globe) on unsupported iPhones/iPods/iPads running iOS 15+.

title: LatestTranslate
description: Makes Apple's Translate app support all languages to date. For example, making all iOS 17 languages available to iOS 15 and 16. If the tweak doesn't work, restart Translate app and ensure you have internet connection. If to no avail, you may reinstall this tweak.

title: OSAnalytics
description:
Enables the private com.apple.OSAnalytics diagnostics entitlement so that the crash logs will include application-specific system logs whenever applicable. This is very useful for the developers to debug why their tweaks really crash on their consumer devices by looking at the crash logs that are more informative. This package has been uploaded to this repository with the permission of the original author dlevi309.
Source code
changes: Properly added support for iOS 15 (credits to @NightwindDev)

title: SFSymbols
description:
Backports latest SF Symbols to your device.


For developers who want to benefit from the latest SF Symbols in their app, include com.ps.sfsymbols in your control file.


There are two SFSymbols packages that have to be used together:
extra_content:
1. SFSymbols: Makes the system uses SF Symbols from SFSymbolAssets package
  2. SFSymbolsAssets: Contains the actual SF Symbols assets, will be updated when the newer version came out (usually with iOS update)
changes: Fixed the tweak not working on iOS 17+
Fixed a possible crash on iOS 15

title: NoSwiftAtRuntime
description:
Avoids crashing when performing runtime instrumentation on apps with incompatible Swift classes (using recent Swift compiler versions).

You can go to Settings > NoSwiftAtRuntime to enable the tweak per app.

Reference: Swift issue #72657
changes: Fixed crashing to safe mode for some rootless devices
